title: Separate Migration and Dictionary into Distinct Pages
description:
Refactors the application to separate the Migration and Dictionary pages into distinct routes and views. Previously they shared a page. After refactoring, login redirects to /dictionary as the default landing page.

This is a low-priority refactoring task that was de-prioritized behind feature work but eventually completed.
acceptance_criteria: Migration and Dictionary are separate pages with distinct routes
Each page loads independently without shared state
ux_changes: Separate navigation entries for Migration and Dictionary pages. Login lands on /dictionary.
middleware_changes: Route separation and login redirect logic updated.
implementation_notes: Refactoring task — separated shared page into independent views. De-prioritized multiple times behind feature work.
comment_summary: Developer requested elaboration, was deprioritized, then eventually completed. Separate pages for migration and dictionary pushed to staging.
